steps.title: Use both listed sounds
steps.content: The student wants to indicate that both soundscapes are on the list. The notes separately say that the Yodo River crickets and the water flowing over Nachi Falls are each on the list.

steps.title: Name both examples
steps.content: B names only Nachi Falls. C describes the list without naming either soundscape. D names only the Yodo River crickets and adds cultural significance. The choice that names both soundscapes and says both are listed meets the goal. The answer is A.
